data.title: Server Infrastructure
data.description: Microsoft.com uses a robust and scalable server infrastructure to handle high traffic volumes seamlessly.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Azure-based cloud servers with load-balancing and redundancy strategies.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Employs Azure CDN services to distribute content closer to users globally, reducing latency.
data.technical_spec: Azure CDN with global Points of Presence (PoPs).

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Microsoft utilizes a microservices architecture for modular functionality and continuous deployment.
data.technical_spec: Docker and Kubernetes for container orchestration.

data.title: Progressive Web Application (PWA)
data.description: Utilizes PWA standards to ensure smooth performance across devices and offline access.

data.title: Database Management
data.description: High-performance database systems to manage extensive data and user interactions.
data.technical_spec: Azure SQL Database with high-availability configurations.
